title: RRule
description: A powerful recurrence rule component for creating and managing complex scheduling patterns with support for various frequencies, intervals, and date constraints.

showcase.title: RRule Showcase
showcase.description: Interactive recurrence rule builder demonstrating various scheduling patterns

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: Simple RRule component with basic weekly recurrence

sections.title: Frequency Options
sections.description: RRule with different frequency options (daily, weekly, monthly, yearly)

sections.title: Interval and Count
sections.description: RRule with custom interval and occurrence count settings

sections.title: By Weekday
sections.description: RRule with specific weekday selections (Monday, Wednesday, Friday)

sections.title: By Month Day
sections.description: RRule with specific days of the month (1st, 15th, 30th)

sections.title: Until Date
sections.description: RRule with end date constraints and count limitations

sections.title: Complex Rules
sections.description: Advanced RRule patterns including business days, weekends, and seasonal rules

sections.title: RRule Picker
sections.description: Interactive RRule builder with real-time preview and generated results

types.title: AXRruleComponent
types.description: RRule component provides a user-friendly interface for creating and managing recurrence rules.

props.name: value
props.description: Current recurrence rule model value (options object or RRULE string).

events.name: valueChange
events.description: Emitted when the model value changes.

events.name: rruleChange
events.description: Emitted with the computed RRule instance when updated.

events.name: optionsChange
events.description: Emitted with the normalized options whenever they change.

events.name: stringChange
events.description: Emitted with the RRULE string representation.

events.name: textChange
events.description: Emitted with the human-readable text of the rule.

methods.content:
/**
 * Updates a single option and recomputes the rule.
 * @param key The option key to update
 * @param value The new value for the option
 */
async updateOption<K extends keyof AXROptionsType>(key: K, value: AXROptionsType[K]): Promise<void>

/**
 * Resets options to defaults and recomputes the rule.
 */
async resetOptions(): Promise<void>

types.title: AXRruleService
types.description: Service for working with RRule recurrence patterns. Provides methods to create RRule instances from options or strings, convert between formats, and query occurrences.

methods.content:
/**
 * Creates an RRule instance from options object.
 * @param options Partial RRule options to create the rule from
 * @returns Promise resolving to the RRule instance
 */
async rruleFromOptions(options: Partial<AXROptionsType>): Promise<AXRRuleType>

/**
 * Creates an RRule instance from a RRULE string.
 * @param ruleString Valid RRULE string (e.g., "RRULE:FREQ=WEEKLY;COUNT=5")
 * @returns Promise resolving to the RRule instance
 */
async rruleFromString(ruleString: string): Promise<AXRRuleType>

/**
 * Creates an RRule instance from human-readable text.
 * @param ruleText Human-readable text describing the recurrence (e.g., "every Monday for 5 weeks")
 * @returns Promise resolving to the RRule instance
 */
async rruleFromText(ruleText: string): Promise<AXRRuleType>

/**
 * Extracts options from an RRule instance.
 * @param rule RRule instance to extract options from
 * @returns Parsed options with all required fields
 */
rruleToOptions(rule: AXRRuleType): AXParsedOptionsType

/**
 * Converts an RRule instance to RRULE string format.
 * @param rule RRule instance to convert
 * @returns RRULE string representation
 */
rruleToString(rule: AXRRuleType): string

/**
 * Converts an RRule instance to human-readable text.
 * @param rule RRule instance to convert
 * @returns Human-readable text description
 */
rruleToText(rule: AXRRuleType): string

/**
 * Gets all occurrences of the rule up to a limit.
 * @param rule RRule instance to query
 * @param limit Maximum number of occurrences to return (default: 500)
 * @returns Array of occurrence dates
 */
rruleGetAll(rule: AXRRuleType, limit?: number): Date[]

/**
 * Gets occurrences between two dates.
 * @param rule RRule instance to query
 * @param after Start date (exclusive by default)
 * @param before End date (exclusive by default)
 * @param inclusive Whether to include the boundary dates
 * @returns Array of occurrence dates between the specified dates
 */
rruleGetBetween(rule: AXRRuleType, after: Date, before: Date, inclusive?: boolean): Date[]

/**
 * Gets the last occurrence before the specified date.
 * @param rule RRule instance to query
 * @param date Date to search before
 * @param inclusive Whether to include the specified date
 * @returns Last occurrence before the date, or null if none found
 */
rruleGetBefore(rule: AXRRuleType, date: Date, inclusive?: boolean): Date | null

/**
 * Gets the first occurrence after the specified date.
 * @param rule RRule instance to query
 * @param date Date to search after
 * @param inclusive Whether to include the specified date
 * @returns First occurrence after the date, or null if none found
 */
rruleGetAfter(rule: AXRRuleType, date: Date, inclusive?: boolean): Date | null

types.title: AXRrulePreviewComponent
types.description: Preview component that displays RRule information including human-readable text, RRULE string, and generated occurrences.

props.name: repeat
props.description: Maximum number of occurrences to display.
